ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient in years */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who sustained the injury */,
  "mechanism" TEXT /* Mechanism of injury (e.g., Contusion, Fall) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Location of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "treatment_provided" TEXT /* Treatment provided for the injury */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., recovered, ongoing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis criterion (e.g., NEXUS, CCR, PECARN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nexus_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NEXUS score */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the score */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis criterion used */,
  "score" TEXT /* NEXUS score assigned to the patient */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was assigned */,
  "score_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the score */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member who assigned the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nexus_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nexus_scores_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nexus_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ccr_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CCR score */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the score */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis criterion used */,
  "score" TEXT /* CCR score assigned to the patient */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was assigned */,
  "score_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the score */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member who assigned the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ccr_scores_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ccr_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ccr_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pecarn_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PECARN score */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the score */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis criterion used */,
  "score" TEXT /* PECARN score assigned to the patient */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was assigned */,
  "score_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the score */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member who assigned the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pecarn_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pecarn_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pecarn_scores_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the medical staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the medical staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the medical staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the medical staff member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
